goal: Validate whether synchronized asset_sheet sprites can reconstruct the full_effect heart currency bar as bar_bg + heart_icon + plus_button + Text Node.

observations: Asset sheet top_currency_bar_bg is a cream rounded panel with leaves; full_effect heart currency bar uses a dark brown capsule frame.
The asset sheet heart icon has no number; source heart state includes number 5, so Text Node is required.
Contain vs stretch cannot fix asset identity mismatch; nine_slice would only solve scaling if the correct dark bar asset existed.

conclusion: The synchronized route works structurally for isolated icons/buttons, but this generated asset sheet did not provide the same dark currency bar background used in full_effect; scale strategy cannot solve identity mismatch.
